Who is this for: executives, managers, employees, business leaders, finance staff, communications teams, customer service representatives, HR personnel
Team or Dept this is for: Executive Leadership, Finance, Communications, HR, Risk Management, Compliance, IT Security
Description: Understanding impersonation risks for executives and employees.
Prerequisites: No prior technical knowledge is required, though a basic familiarity with everyday business communication tools such as email and video conferencing will help you get the most from this course.
Learning objectives: By the end of this course, you will be able to identify the key characteristics of deepfake technology and explain how it poses impersonation risks to executives and employees within a business context. You will also be able to apply practical strategies to recognise and respond to deepfake threats, helping to safeguard your organisation against reputational and financial harm.
